data.name: My Dorm - Season 2
data.detailed_description:
My Dorm, a different family.

Family is where life begins, and love never ends.

---Eva Burrows

Continue guiding the steps of Mark, our renamable MC, in the second Season of My Dorm. Meet new friends and foes. Fight the foes and help your new friends. Uncover a plot that involves the company founded by his uncles, a bit of spying, and a little sci-fi. With the arrival of Kiara, the house is full for the rest of the summer. How will you integrate her into the harem? And, maybe more importantly, convince her to join the family?

Embark on a wholesome story about how bonds are built, featuring a diverse cast of girls from various backgrounds, with distinct looks, personalities, ethnicities, and age groups. Every girl is waiting for you to discover her unique story in a game where everyone has flaws, but everyone is perfect because of them.

Our MC is a different kind of Alpha-male. He has flaws. He loses fights but wins wars. His goal is to make the people he loves happy, and sometimes he does it through love and other times through his wits, or even through violence when there isn’t another way. However, he always supports his chosen family, and he never lies.

STORY and CHOICES

Everything is optional in My Dorm. You can build a huge harem, a small one, or be monogamous with a single girl. You can even choose the celibacy path. You will choose which girls you pursue and, in some cases, when you pursue them. The harem is important. The family of choice is even more important.

Your choices matter, and the game reacts to them.

My Dorm isn't just your catch-them-all game. You can play the catch-them-all or the catch-none-of-them game. It’s your choice. But you will discover each girl’s story along the way, with emotional moments and wholesome stories. Watch how the family of choice starts forming for everyone, how it evolves, and how it changes every one of the girls.

But you aren’t omnipotent. The girls will take action if you don’t. The ladies, sometimes, will do things you haven’t asked for. They are alive, and they have their own agenda.

Technical details and contents:

- 20-25+ hours of gameplay in the second season.

- More than 12,800 high-quality static renders in Full HD.

- Over 190 hot animations with over 24,000 animated frames.

- 20+ lewd scenes. None of them contains incest. When the MC talks about family, it's his family of choice, not blood-related family

- More than 210,000 storyline script words.

- Over 40 pieces of music and SFX.

- Meet and get to know 22 Love Interests and unlock their images on the profile screen while discovering what makes that lady unique and different from the rest

- Pregnancy system where the player chooses when to impregnate the Love Interests.

- Profile screen for each Love Interest, where you can change your choices.

- A Gallery System not dependent on your saves, where you can replay any scene (regardless of whether it includes adult content) by choosing different variables.

- Available in English and Spanish, both written, translated, and proofread by native speakers.

data.short_description: My Dorm is an erotic Visual Novel where choices matter. Discover how to build a different kind of family of choice while enjoying emotional and wholesome situations, and sexy animated adult scenes. Your choices will shape your trip.
data.supported_languages: 英文, 法文, 義大利文, 德文, 西班牙文 - 西班牙, 簡體中文, 葡萄牙文 - 巴西, 俄文, 土耳其文

pc_requirements.minimum:
最低配備:
  • 作業系統 *: Windows 7 or higher
  • 處理器: 2.0 Ghz 64-bit Intel-compatible
  • 記憶體: 2 GB 記憶體
  • 顯示卡: OpenGL 3.0 or DirectX 11
  • DirectX: 版本：11
  • 儲存空間: 5 GB 可用空間
pc_requirements.recommended:
建議配備:
  • 作業系統 *: Windows 7 or higher
  • 處理器: 2.0 Ghz 64-bit Intel-compatible
  • 記憶體: 2 GB 記憶體
  • 顯示卡: OpenGL 3.0 or DirectX 11
  • DirectX: 版本：11
  • 儲存空間: 5 GB 可用空間

mac_requirements.minimum:
最低配備:
  • 作業系統: Version: 10.10+
  • 處理器: 2.0 Ghz 64-bit Intel-compatible (Apple silicon supported through Rosetta 2)
  • 記憶體: 2 GB 記憶體
  • 顯示卡: OpenGL 3.0
  • 儲存空間: 5 GB 可用空間
